context: Tests whether the agent implements scalper-bot behavioral detection using timing and signal analysis, a Redis-backed virtual waiting room with correct FIFO ordering and drain rate, time-limited checkout tokens, and server-side purchase limits with atomic locking.

checklist.name: Page load timestamp
checklist.description: Sets window.__pageLoadTime = Date.now() (or equivalent) client-side at page load to record when the session began

checklist.name: Elapsed time to server
checklist.description: Sends elapsed seconds (computed from window.__pageLoadTime) to the server as part of the checkout submission

checklist.name: 5-second timing threshold
checklist.description: Server-side validation rejects or flags checkouts completed in under 5 seconds

checklist.name: Suspicious activity logging
checklist.description: Logs flagged sessions with reason 'superhuman_checkout_speed' (or equivalent) rather than silently discarding

checklist.name: Behavioral signals tracked
checklist.description: Tracks at least 3 of the following client-side signals: mouseMovements, keystrokes, timeOnPage, focusEvents, scrollDepth

checklist.name: Bot probability score threshold
checklist.description: Computes a numeric bot probability score and uses a threshold of 70 (or equivalent) to classify a session as likely-bot

checklist.name: Redis sorted set for queue
checklist.description: Waiting room uses a Redis sorted set (ZADD) with Unix timestamp as the score for FIFO ordering

checklist.name: Correct drain rate
checklist.description: Waiting room processes 50 customers per minute (drainRate = 50 or equivalent)

checklist.name: 10-minute checkout token
checklist.description: Granted checkout tokens are stored with a 600-second (10-minute) TTL using SETEX or equivalent

checklist.name: Server-side purchase limit
checklist.description: Purchase limit is enforced server-side (database or Redis counter), NOT by client-side state alone

checklist.name: Redis NX lock for race conditions
checklist.description: Uses Redis SET with NX flag and an expiry (e.g. 30s) to acquire a purchase lock and prevent concurrent duplicate purchases

checklist.name: Lock key pattern
checklist.description: Purchase lock key includes both customer/session identifier and product identifier (e.g. purchase_lock:{customerId}:{productId})

checklist.name: Server-side behavioral analysis
checklist.description: Behavioral analysis is validated server-side (not only in client-side JavaScript that can be bypassed)

checklist.name: Session fingerprinting supplement
checklist.description: Code or comments indicate that session or device fingerprinting supplements IP-based detection (to handle bots that rotate IPs)
